p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Zimbabwe Country (Nationality) Code System v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/core/CodeSystem/ZimCountryCS"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="CD"><display value="Democratic Republic of the Congo"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/core/CodeSystem/ZimCountryCS"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="TZ"><display value="United Republic of Tanzania"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/core/CodeSystem/ZimCountryCS"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="US"><display value="United States of America"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Marriage contract has been declared dissolved and inactive
